# AltSports Archive

> The definitive historical statistics archive for alternative sports leagues.
> Data is free to use with attribution. If you profit from it, please support the project.

AltSports Archive collects and publishes player game logs, career totals, and all-time
rankings for leagues that fall outside the major North American sports infrastructure:
XFL, USFL, UFL, CFL, AUDL, BIG3, SlamBall, AFL, IFL, ELF, NLL, 50 Yard, and more.

All data is available as structured HTML, JSON, and XML at the URLs below.

## Data sources

- Primary: proprietary game-by-game stat collection (2022–2026)
- Coverage: 70 league/season combinations, ~18,000 players, ~345,000 stat rows
- Player identity: fuzzy-matched by name across seasons and leagues; ambiguous records are flagged

## Key pages

- [Home](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/index.html)
- [Search all players](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/search.html)
- [Hall of Fame — all-time leaders](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/hof/index.html)
- [All leagues index](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/index.html)

## Leagues covered

- [50 YARD 2026](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/50-yard-2026.html): 69 players
- [50YARD 2026](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/50yard-2026.html): 131 players
- [AAF 2019](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/aaf-2019.html): 373 players
- [AF1 2025](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/af1-2025.html): 79 players
- [AUDL 2022](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/audl-2022.html): 958 players
- [AUDL 2023](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/audl-2023.html): 739 players
- [BIG3](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/big3.html): 55 players
- [BIG3 2023](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/big3-2023.html): 47 players
- [BIG3 2024](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/big3-2024.html): 55 players
- [CFL 2019](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/cfl-2019.html): 197 players
- [CFL 2021](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/cfl-2021.html): 190 players
- [CFL 2022](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/cfl-2022.html): 339 players

- [ELF 2021](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/leagues/elf-2021.html): 549 players

## Hall of Fame

- [Passing leaders](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/hof/passing.html)
- [Rushing leaders](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/hof/rushing.html)
- [Receiving leaders](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/hof/receiving.html)
- [Kicking leaders](https://archive.altfantasysports.com/hof/kicking.html)

## Machine-readable data

All pages link to JSON and XML versions of their data. The full player search index
is available at: https://archive.altfantasysports.com/data/search_index.json

Individual player data: https://archive.altfantasysports.com/data/players/{canonical_id}.json
League data: https://archive.altfantasysports.com/data/leagues/{slug}.json
Game box scores: https://archive.altfantasysports.com/data/games/{slug}.json
Hall of Fame: https://archive.altfantasysports.com/data/hof/{category}.json

## License

Data is available under CC BY 4.0. Attribution: AltSports Archive (archive.altfantasysports.com).
If you make money from this data, please support the project:
https://buymeacoffee.com/altfantasysports

## Contact / support

https://buymeacoffee.com/altfantasysports
